prestazioni: Engine: Lotus 918S (Type 918) V8, 3.5L twin-turbocharged, forged internals upgrade with JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (9.5:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) per bank, custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifolds by Bell Engineering, and a Motec M150 ECU with custom fuel and ignition maps for 12 psi boost (stock fuel system retained but upgraded with Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors).

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the transaxle (Type C56, Lotus-specific), paired with a Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch and a custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio from a late-model Esprit Sport 350. Transmission synchros upgraded to carbon fiber units by OS Giken, with a short-shift kit by B&M for the Type C56 gearbox.

Suspension/Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX40 coilover kit (Lotus-specific valving, 400lb/in front springs, 500lb/in rear springs) with spherical bearing top mounts by SuperPro, polybushings throughout (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, rear trailing arm bushings), and a custom front sway bar (24mm adjustable) by Eibach. Chassis reinforcement via a Lotus Sport 350 front strut brace and a custom rear subframe brace by Bell Engineering, with seam-welding of the entire chassis for rigidity.
estetica: Body: Full Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (Lotus Esprit-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper), with a custom 3D-printed front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) and a ducktail spoiler by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 30% larger than OEM). Paint: BASF Glasurit 90-Line custom mix 'Lotus Racing Green' with gold pearl flakes, matte black accents on the lower cladding and diffuser.

Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x10.5 ET25 front, 18x12 ET35 rear (Lotus-specific offsets), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/18 front, 305/30/18 rear). Custom center-lock adapters by DPE for Lotus bolt pattern, with titanium wheel bolts by ARP.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Trimworks (Lotus-specific pattern, 'Charcoal' with 'Lime Green' stitching), including door cards, dashboard, and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses). Custom roll cage by Safety Devices (8-point, bolt-in, Lotus-specific design) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline (plumbed to engine bay and cabin). Steering wheel: Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) with custom Lotus emblem.
